content.text: Nepal is an independent, indivisible, sovereign, secular, inclusive, democratic, socialism-oriented, federal democratic republican state. Explanation: For the purposes of this Article, "secular" means religious, cultural freedoms, including protection of religion, culture handed down from the time immemorial.
The territory of Nepal shall comprise:

subclauses.text: the territory existing at the time of commencement of this Constitution, and
such other territory as may be acquired after the commencement of this Constitution.
